query: UPDATE author_profiles SET avatarUrl = (SELECT avatarUrl FROM (SELECT avatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE id = 150022) AS t), s3AvatarUrl = (SELECT s3AvatarUrl FROM (SELECT s3AvatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE id = 150022) AS t2) WHERE id = 30080;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute UPDATE author_profiles SET avatarUrl = (SELECT avatarUrl FROM (SELECT avatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE id = 150022) AS t), s3AvatarUrl = (SELECT s3AvatarUrl FROM (SELECT s3AvatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE id = 150022) AS t2) WHERE id = 30080;
